name: Adaptive Skin
description: Reduces AC and adds Magic Resistance based on hostile creatures nearby.

name: ao dall
description: Allows target to see again.

name: ao poison
description: Neutralize the poison afflicting the target, cleansing their body and restoring them to a healthy state.

name: Cat's Hearing
description: Allows you to see hidden creatures. [Red Dugon]

name: Cure Ailments
description: Cures Poison, Dall, and Suain. Self only.

name: Dodge
description: Reduces positional damage mod by 25%. Decreases AC, increases MR. 20% chance to avoid durability dmg.

name: Earthen Stance
description: [Earth] Reflects damage back to the target at a 20% chance.

name: Evasion
description: Reduces positional damage mod by 50%. Decreases AC, increases MR. 30% chance to avoid durability damage. Upgrade to Dodge. Pure Only.

name: Flame Stance
description: [Fire] You reserve 20% health to gain damage based on the amount reserved. Upgrades Smoke Stance.

name: Gentle Touch
description: Heals yourself and players surrounding you. [Green Dugon]

name: Goad
description: Taunt the enemy to attack you (small tile range). [White Dugon]

name: Howl
description: Taunt the enemy to attack you (medium tile range). Replaces Goad. [Blue Dugon]

name: Inner Fire
description: Increase health regeneration by eight percent. [White Dugon]

name: Last Stand
description: Survive through any offensive for 8 seconds. [Blue Dugon]

name: Lightning Stance
description: [Wind] Procs 20% wind damage and a 50% chance to apply crit on the next 5 non-assail hits. Upgrades Thunder Stance.

name: Mist Stance
description: [Water] Deals water damage around you when hit.

name: Phoenix Grasp
description: Pull the enemy to you.

name: Roar
description: Taunt the enemy to attack you (large tile range). Replaces Howl.

name: Rock Stance
description: [Earth] Has a 70% chance of reflecting damage and some status effects. Upgrades Earthen Stance.

name: Smoke Stance
description: [Fire] You reserve 10% health to gain damage based on the amount reserved.

name: Taunt
description: Taunt the enemy to attack you.

name: Thunder Stance
description: [Wind] Procs 10% wind damage and a 30% chance to apply crit on the next non-assail hits.

name: Tide Stance
description: [Water] Deals water damage around you when hit. Upgrades Mist Stance.

name: ao ard cradh
description: Banishes the relentless ard cradh curse from the target, freeing them from its relentless grip.

name: ao beag cradh
description: Cleanses the target, lifting the burden of the dreaded Beag Cradh curse.

name: ao cradh
description: Liberates the target from the grip of the cradh curse, freeing them from its malevolent effects.

name: ao dall
description: Allows target to see again.

name: ao dia cradh
description: Removes dia cradh from the target. (Light Priest Only)

name: ao mor cradh
description: Dispels the oppressive Mor Cradh curse from the target, liberating them from its tormenting influence.

name: ao poison
description: Cleanses the body and restores the target to a healthy state.

name: ao suain
description: Neutralizes suain, unfreezing targeted creature.

name: ard ioc
itemRequirements: Enchanted Earrings (1), Polyp Sac (1), Leech's Tail (1)
description: Restores a considerable amount of health to the target.

name: ard naomh aite
description: Temporarily reduces the damage taken by the player by 30% for a brief duration.

name: armachd
description: Significantly reduces the target's armor class by 10, making them less vulnerable to incoming attacks.

name: Aura of Blessing
description: A singular buff designed to push defensive capabilities to their limit.

name: Aura of Torment
description: A singular buff designed to push offensive capabilities to their limit.

name: beag ioc comlha
description: Slightly restores the health of the caster's group.

name: beag ioc
description: Restores a modest amount of health to the target, helping them recover.

name: beag naomh aite
description: Temporarily reduces the damage taken by the player by 8% for a brief duration.

name: beag pramh
description: Puts the enemy to sleep for 6 seconds.

name: beannaich
description: Enhances the target's hit by 10.

name: beothaich
description: Revives the targeted ghost, granting them a second chance, although the spell has a lengthy cooldown period before it can be used again.

name: Bind
description: Decreases the target's attack speed by 30% for 30 seconds. (Dark Priest Only)

name: Dachaidh
description: Teleports the caster to their home nation.

name: Dark Storm
description: A storm of dark energy damages creatures near the target. Deals % of current HP, effective on high HP targets. (Pure Dark Priest Only)

name: Deo Lamh
description: Attacks enemies on all sides of you with light. (Light Priest Only)

name: Deo Searg Meall
description: Attacks the enemy with intense light. (Light Priest Only)

name: Deo Searg
description: Attacks the enemy with intense light. (Light Priest Only)

name: dinarcoli
description: Awakens the target, freeing them from the grasp of pramh effects.

name: fas deireas
description: Enhances the target's attack damage by 6, boosting their offensive prowess and increasing the amount of damage they deal.

name: Heal Aura
description: Places a zone around the target that heals yourself and allies. (Pure Light Priest Only)

name: ioc comlha
itemRequirements: Giant Bat's Wing (2), Royal Silver Ring (1)
description: Moderately restores the health of the caster's group.

name: ioc
description: Restores a substantial amount of health to the target, significantly aiding their recovery.

name: Miasma
description: Inflicts a greater poison to the target. (Dark Priest Only). Upgrades poison.

name: mor beannaich
description: Enhances the target's hit by 20.

name: mor fas deireas
description: Enhances the target's attack damage by 12, boosting their offensive prowess and increasing the amount of damage they deal.

name: mor ioc comlha
description: Significantly restores the health of the caster's group.

name: mor ioc
description: Restores a generous amount of health to the target, greatly bolstering their well-being.

name: mor naomh aite
description: Temporarily reduces the damage taken by the player by 22% for a brief duration.

name: Motivate
description: Accelerates the target's attack speed, allowing them to assail more rapidly. Lasts for 2 minutes.

name: naomh aite
description: Temporarily reduces the damage taken by the player by 15% for a brief duration.

name: nuadhaich
description: Restores an immense amount of health to the target. (Light Priest Only)

name: poison
description: Inflicts a potent poison upon the target, causing ongoing damage over a period of time.

name: pramh
description: Puts the enemy to sleep for 12 seconds.

name: Prevent Affliction
description: Imposes a restrictive effect on the target, preventing them from casting any form of cradh.

name: Quake
description: Inflicts damage in the vicinity of an ally over a duration of 10 seconds.

name: Regeneration
description: Heals the target based on your wisdom and 1% of their maximum health. (Light Priest only)

name: Resurrect
description: Resurrects the targeted ghost, granting them a second chance. 10 minute cooldown. Pure only.

name: Revive
description: Revives the targeted ghost, granting them a second chance. Slightly reduced cooldown.

name: Self Revive
description: Empowers the Priest with the ability to resurrect themselves, granting them the means to overcome death.

name: Shadow Pact
description: A temporary buff placed on an ally causing them to be healed when you cast a strioch spell. (Dark Priest Only)

name: Spark
description: Attacks the enemy with base non-elemental damage.

name: Strioch Bais Meall
description: Attacks the enemy with intense darkness. (Dark Priest Only)

name: Strioch Bais
description: Attacks the enemy with intense darkness. (Dark Priest Only)

name: suain
description: Imposes a state of absolute immobilization upon the enemy, rendering them frozen.

name: Void Jolt
description: Unleashes a non-elemental attack. The effectiveness of the attack is directly tied to the amount of mana available. (Dark Priest only)

name: Vortex
description: Inflicts a lot of damage in the vicinity of an ally over a duration of 10 seconds. Upgrades Quake.

name: Zap
description: Unleashes a non-elemental attack.

name: Bolt Trap
description: Lays a trap that deals a fair amount of pure damage.

name: Coiled Bolt Trap
description: Lays a trap that deals a large amount of pure damage.

name: Concentration
description: Increases damage and cdr based on your dexterity. Upgrades Focus. Pure Only.

name: Detect Traps

name: Eisd Creutair
description: Allows you to see hidden creatures.

name: Focus

name: Vanish

name: Battle Frenzy

name: Fury
